summary: Slice 3 QA complete. All 15 items PASS across 3 roles (Central, Master, Outlet). History & Ledger screen with Transfer History and Stock Ledger tabs fully functional. Role-based visibility working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All 15 Slice 3 items verified end-to-end across Central/Master/Outlet roles
/history route loads correctly with History & Ledger component
Sidebar nav item 'History & Ledger' positioned correctly between 'Pending Queues' and 'Reports'
Transfer History tab shows all expected columns: ID, Date, Source, Destination, Status, Type, Items, Direction, Updated
Stock Ledger tab shows all expected columns: Date, Store, Item, Movement, Dir., Qty, Unit, Before, After, Reference, Counterparty, Reason
Status filter pills work correctly (Requested/Approved/Dispatched/Received/Partially Received/Cancelled/Rejected)
Search filter works (by transfer ID or store name)
Clicking transfer row navigates to /transfer/:id (Transfer Detail page)
Stock Ledger reference links (Transfer #NNN) navigate to Transfer Detail
Role-based visibility: Central sees 5 transfers, Master sees 6 transfers (own+children), Outlet sees 3 transfers (own only)
No backend terms (master/central/franchise) visible in UI - correctly shows Central Store/Master Store/Outlet
Before/After columns correctly show '—' (no data available in seed)
Empty state displays correctly when filters return no results
No write action buttons anywhere on History & Ledger screen (read-only as expected)
Stock Ledger lazy-loads transfer details and derives 9 movements from 5 transfers (Central view)
Store type badges visible in Stock Ledger tab (Central Store, Master Store, Outlet)
seed_data_creation: None - using existing /app/backend/seed_data.py with 7 stores and 12 transfers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Slice 3 fully validated. History & Ledger screen at /history with two tabs (Transfer History + Stock Ledger). Transfer counts per role: Central=5, Master=6, Outlet=3. Stock Ledger derives item-level movements from transfer details API. Before/After columns show '—' as expected. All filters (status, direction, search, date range) working. Reference links navigate to Transfer Detail. No write actions on this screen.
